title: Chord Inversions
description: Learn what happens when the root isn't on the bottom. Covers 1st and 2nd inversions.

sessions.title: Third on the Bottom
sessions.description: Learn to read and play 1st inversion chords.

sessions.title: Fifth on the Bottom
sessions.description: Learn to read and play 2nd inversion chords.

levels.criteria: Can identify standard triads regardless of voicing order.
